programmes.show_description: Ten years after being found guilty of the murder of her husband, Susie Mowbray's conviction was overturned. Would a second jury believe her story that Bill Mowbray took his own life?
Chante Mallard struck pedestrian Gregory Biggs with her car, impaling him in the windshield.  What she chose to do, and not do next, is what turned a terrible accident into a shocking case of murder.
Shots rang out when off-duty Dallas police officer Amber Guyger found Botham Jean in her apartment. Except it wasn't her apartment. Was it an accident or murder?
Tommy Carlton owed his ex-wife $85,000 in back child support and thought it would be a lot cheaper to pay a hit man $2,000 to make her go away permanently.  Little did he know that hit man was a cop.
...With Vinnie Politan. The series looks beyond the usual suspects to bring you the gripping stories of everyday people caught up in a world of deception and manipulation as they become accomplices.

A Mother is found murdered in the trunk of her car.  Was this a robbery gone wrong or something more sinister?  A case that was tried three times, could the killer still be on the loose?
A doctor's wife dies under mysterious circumstances. When clues lead back to her husband, he flees the country.  But when he finally faces a jury, will there be enough evidence for a conviction?
Death of a delivery driver.  A young mother heads out to deliver a pizza and ends up dead.  Now her ex-boyfriend is under suspicion.  But did he act alone, or did he have help from his wife?
A high school senior is murdered in his own home and investigators follow a string of clues to an unbelievable suspect, the victim's twin brother.
